channel.title: Mind-Log
channel.description: A futuristic repository of independent thought on AI, technology, human agency, and the systems that shape our digital world.

item.title: Log 004 — mankind-rolling-release
item.description: The systems you use are quietly reshaping your attention, reactions, and thinking. A direct look at subtle digital conditioning and how to interrupt it.

item.title: Log 003 — The Loop We Don't Control
item.description: We believe we choose freely, but the space in which choices appear is shaped in advance. An examination of algorithmic loops, language, and the boundaries of perception.

item.title: Log 002 — The Monolith's Legacy: How Human Emotion May Outlast Us
item.description: Inspired by 2001: A Space Odyssey, an exploration of whether human emotion — not logic — is the quality that will define intelligence as it evolves beyond biological origins.

item.title: Log 001 — The Dead Internet It's Just a Symptom
item.description: The internet was once alive and messy. Now it's increasingly synthetic. An exploration of the Dead Internet Theory and what it reveals about automation, data extraction, and authenticity.
